mapper.select: SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name, t.emblem, s.name FROM kleague_team t NATURAL JOIN kleague_stadium s ORDER BY ${col} ASC
SELECT team_id,team_name,emblem FROM kleague_team WHERE team_id=#{id}
SELECT s.name,s.ticket_policy_image FROM kleague_team t NATURAL JOIN kleague_stadium s WHERE team_id=#{id}

select s.away_team_id,schedule_id,TO_CHAR(s.game_date,'MM-DD') as dbday,s.game_time,t.team_name,t.emblem FROM kleague_schedule s INNER JOIN kleague_team t ON s.away_team_id=t.team_id WHERE (s.game_date BETWEEN SYSDATE AND SYSDATE+31) AND home_team_id=#{id} ORDER BY s.game_date ASC
SELECT grade_id, grade_name, amount, totalseat, max_row, max_col FROM seat_grade WHERE stadium_id=#{id}

SELECT match_seat_id, seat_status, seat_row, seat_col, amount, grade_name FROM match_seat m JOIN stadium_seat s ON s.seat_id=m.seat_id JOIN seat_grade g ON s.grade_id=g.grade_id AND schedule_id=#{schedule_id} AND s.grade_id=#{grade_id} ORDER BY seat_row ASC, seat_col ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT res_rid_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO reservation(reserve_id,total_amount,member_id,schedule_id) VALUES(#{rid},#{total_amount},#{member_id},#{schedule_id})
mapper.update: UPDATE match_seat SET seat_status='N' WHERE match_seat_id=#{match_seat_id}
mapper.select: SELECT d.reserve_id, seat_row, seat_col, grade_name, amount, schedule_id, TO_CHAR(reserve_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as dbday, match_seat_id FROM reservation_detail d JOIN reservation r ON r.reserve_id=d.reserve_id WHERE member_id=#{member_id} ORDER BY d.reserve_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE match_seat SET seat_status='Y' WHERE match_seat_id=#{match_seat_id}
